paper.title: The relationship between autogenous shrinkage and pore structure of cement paste with mineral admixtures
paper.authors: Yue Li; Junling Bao; Yilin Guo
paper.notes: Cement paste study focuses on autogenous shrinkage and pore structure; no compressive-strength values in packet.

evidence.evidence_text: Cement paste study focuses on autogenous shrinkage and pore structure; no compressive-strength values in packet.
